name: Granola

auth.notes: MCP uses browser OAuth with Dynamic Client Registration and no API key/service-account auth. REST API uses Bearer API keys created in the Granola desktop app; available on Business/Enterprise with admin-controlled access scopes on Enterprise.

rateLimits: REST API: burst capacity 25 requests, 5-second window, sustained 5 requests/second (300/minute), returns 429 when exceeded. MCP docs state limits vary by plan/tool and average around 100 requests/minute across tools.
pagination: REST list endpoints use cursor pagination with hasMore/cursor response fields and page_size query parameter from 1 to 30.
notes: Official docs expose llms.txt and an OpenAPI 3.1 spec.
Public REST endpoints currently cover listing notes, getting a note, and listing folders; use MCP for AI-assistant retrieval across notes/transcripts.
